scripts.lint: npm run lint:html && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:js
scripts.minify:js: terser src/js/ui.js -o assets/js/ui.js --compress --mangle && terser src/js/globe.js -o assets/js/globe.js --compress --mangle && terser src/js/snake.js -o assets/js/snake.js --compress --mangle && terser src/js/orbit.js -o assets/js/orbit.js --compress --mangle && terser src/js/hero.js -o assets/js/hero.js --compress --mangle && terser src/js/preloader.js -o assets/js/preloader.js --compress --mangle && terser src/js/main.js -o assets/js/main.js --compress --mangle
scripts.minify: npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js
